creator: markun@onohara.to
text:
Hello,

> Hi, The port does not build. Can you take a look in it? 
> http://tb.miwibox.org/index.php?action=describe_port&id=553 

Oops, I forgot dependency of devel/p5-Module-Install.
Correct ports is as follows.

Best regards,

-- 
Masahiro Teramoto
   markun@onohara.to


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract
#	p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/Makefile
#	p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/distinfo
#	p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/pkg-descr
#	p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/pkg-plist
#
echo c - p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract
mkdir -p p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/Makefile << 'END-of-p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract
X# Date created:		2007-04-10
X# Whom:			Masahiro Teramoto <markun@onohara.to>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract
XPORTVERSION=	0.01
XCATEGORIES=	japanese textproc perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	../../authors/id/Y/YA/YAPPO
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	ja-p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	markun@onohara.to
XCOMMENT=	summary generator for Japanese
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Class-Accessor>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Accessor \
X		p5-UNIVERSAL-require>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-UNIVERSAL-require \
X		p5-Module-Install>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Module-Install
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
X
XMAN3=		Lingua::JA::Summarize::Extract::Plugin::Sentence::Base.3 \
X		Lingua::JA::Summarize::Extract::Plugin::Parser::Ngram.3 \
X		Lingua::JA::Summarize::Extract::Plugin::Parser::Trim.3 \
X		Lingua::JA::Summarize::Extract.3 \
X		Lingua::JA::Summarize::Extract::Plugin::Parser::NgramSimple.3
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/Makefile
echo x - p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/distinfo << 'END-of-p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/distinfo'
XMD5 (Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract-0.01.tar.gz) = 70cc83b8b2daa515c68503a4af0e119f
XSHA256 (Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract-0.01.tar.gz) = a9902f914bc56857c00f12b5583981e323fc1360e3f57ed938d309810883efd3
XSIZE (Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract-0.01.tar.gz) = 4603
END-of-p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/distinfo
echo x - p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/pkg-descr << 'END-of-p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/pkg-descr'
XLingua::JA::Summarize::Extract is a summary generator for
XJapanese text. The extraction method can be changed with
Xthe plug-in mechanism.
X
XAuthor:	Kazuhiro Osawa <ko@yappo.ne.jp>
XWWW:	http://search.cpan.org/~yappo/Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract-0.01/
END-of-p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/pkg-descr
echo x - p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/pkg-plist << 'END-of-p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/pkg-plist'
X@comment $FreeBSD$
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/.packlist
X%%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/Plugin.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/ResultSet.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/Plugin/Parser/Trim.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/Plugin/Parser/Ngram.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/Plugin/Parser/NgramSimple.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/Plugin/Sentence/Base.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/Plugin/Sentence/Tiny.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/Plugin/Scoring/Base.pm
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Lingua/JA/Summarize
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Lingua/JA
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/Plugin/Sentence
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/Plugin/Scoring
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/Plugin/Parser
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract/Plugin
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize/Extract
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA/Summarize
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Lingua/JA
END-of-p5-Lingua-JA-Summarize-Extract/pkg-plist
exit
